item.title:

World number one Luke Littler takes on world number two Luke Humphries
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 5min LITTLER HUMPHRIES
World number one Luke Littler takes on world number two Luke Humphries for a spot in the final in Rotterdam!
http:// bit.ly/NewPDCApp #PLDarts | SF1 4 2 3 12 2 mil

item.title:
livedarts: Live Darts @livedarts · 6min 𝗣𝗿𝗲𝗺𝗶𝗲𝗿 𝗟𝗲𝗮𝗴𝘂𝗲 𝗗𝗮𝗿𝘁𝘀 𝗡𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁 𝟭𝟭 𝗦𝗲𝗺𝗶-𝗙𝗶𝗻𝗮𝗹𝘀

item.description: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 11min Josh Rock delivers a magnificent display with a 102+ average and 50% on the doubles to trounce Stephen Bunting 5 9 49 5 mil
